case_title: DIPAK PATEL VS. GLEN TEAGUE et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT TEAGUE, GLEN
ORDER OF THE COURT FOR STAY OF EXECUTION
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DIPAK SERVED APR-23-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TEAGUE, GLEN
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY DEC. OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $35.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TEAGUE, GLEN
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DIPAK AS TO DEFENDANT TEAGUE, GLEN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT TEAGUE, GLENN (SUED AS GLEN)
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT TEAGUE, GLENN (SUED AS GLEN) HEARING SET FOR JUL-21-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUL-21-2010 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT GLENN TEAGUE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT TEAGUE, GLENN (SUED AS GLEN)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, DIPAK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TEAGUE, GLEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2697 MISSION STREET #122, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110 - CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT TEAGUE, GLENN (SUED AS GLEN)
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT TEAGUE, GLEN
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF GLENN TEAGUE ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
